heading: Organization
label: 200101 Organization
text: Society of American Florists and Ornamental Horticulturists (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic in the District of Columbia.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20010136:5401 (1st sentence words before “for the education of the general public”).(1st sentence words before “for the education of the general public”), ; , .Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 876, § 131 Stat. 1453June 29, 1938, ch. 79652 Stat. 1226This section is substituted for the source provision to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.
